input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

recent_thinks: [0-2] The background shifts from a warm yellow-beige hue to a cooler, muted green-grey tone. Central text reading "myrecipes HOLIDAY TABLE" remains stationary while darkening slightly. A dark holly graphic with berries stays positioned in the upper right corner. Faint floral swirl patterns become visible on the left side against the new background hue.

[2-4] The background transitions to light blue, replacing the previous green-grey tone. The dark holly graphic vanishes, replaced by hanging patterned ornaments and large white snowflakes. The text "myrecipes" turns orange-gold. In the final frame, the snowflakes disappear, leaving only the ornaments and faint background swirls.

samples.output: <think>The holiday title card vanishes, replaced by a plain white background. Centered grey serif text reading "Beating Egg Whites" appears prominently. The "myrecipes" logo relocates from the center to the top right corner, appearing smaller with a faint tagline underneath it.</think><action>silent</action>

compressed_segments.text:
[0-2] Background shifts yellow-beige to green-grey; "myrecipes HOLIDAY TABLE" text darkens centrally. Dark holly graphic with berries stays upper right; faint floral swirls appear left.
[2-4] Background turns light blue; holly replaced by hanging patterned ornaments and large white snowflakes. "myrecipes" text becomes orange-gold. Snowflakes vanish by end.
[4-8] Screen clears to plain white; "Beating Egg Whites" appears in grey serif center then fades to near illegibility. "myrecipes" logo moves top right with faint tagline.
[8-14] View cuts to shiny stainless steel bowl with wire whisk. Hands pour clear liquid from small glass bowl into basin. Close-up shows whisk beaters suspended over translucent yellowish liquid with surface bubbles. Bright reflections gleam on metal interior; scene remains static.

From 14s to 22s, the scene remains a static close-up of a shiny stainless steel bowl containing a yellowish liquid with small surface bubbles. A metal wire whisk attachment hangs motionless just above the fluid, while bright reflections gleam on the bowl's curved interior walls and the 'myrecipes' logo is visible in the top right corner. At 22s, the whisk attachment begins rapid rotation, blurring as it strikes the liquid and disturbing the surface bubbles. By 24s, the spinning whisk agitates the mixture significantly, transitioning the clear yellowish fluid into a cloudy, aerated, and frothy consistency with visible turbulence, as the white mixer head becomes partially visible above the bowl.

A white handheld electric mixer with metal whisk attachments rapidly beats a yellowish liquid inside a stainless steel bowl. The beaters spin rapidly, appearing as a blur, vigorously agitating the fluid which transforms from a cloudy state into a thicker, opaque, pale yellow foam. The brand name "BLACK+DECKER" and model "PowerPro" are clearly visible on the side of the white motor housing. Throughout the process, bright reflections on the bowl's curved interior walls shift dynamically alongside the continuous, high-speed mixing motion, highlighting the increasing volume and aeration of the mixture as it maintains a frothy consistency.

recent_thinks: [40-42] The white handheld mixer persists in agitating the contents of the metal bowl. The pale yellow liquid transforms into a thicker, opaque foam as the beaters rotate rapidly. Light reflects off the spinning metal attachments and the bowl's curved sides, highlighting the increasing volume and bubbles in the mixture.

[42-44] The white electric mixer continues to vigorously beat the pale yellow liquid within the stainless steel bowl. The rapid spinning of the metal beaters creates a motion blur as they agitate the mixture, which appears increasingly frothy and aerated. Bright reflections on the bowl's interior walls shift dynamically with the ongoing mixing action.

[44-46] The white mixer continues to agitate the pale yellow liquid in the steel bowl. The beaters spin rapidly, blurring as they incorporate air, turning the liquid into a thicker, opaque foam. Reflections on the bowl's interior shift with the motion, emphasizing the increasing volume and frothy texture of the mixture.

[46-48] The white mixer continues agitating the mixture, with beaters spinning rapidly. The liquid transitions further towards an opaque, pale white foam as air is incorporated. Bright reflections dance on the stainless steel bowl's curved surface, highlighting the thickening texture and increased volume of the frothy liquid.

samples.output: <think>The white handheld mixer continues blending the contents of the metal bowl. The beaters spin fast, creating a blur against the thickening, opaque white foam. Reflections on the stainless steel surface shift with the motion, emphasizing the aerated texture and growing volume of the mixture.</think><action>silent</action>

At 22s, the whisk attachment begins rapid rotation, blurring as it strikes the liquid and disturbing the surface bubbles.
